identity.canonical_title: BIOLOGICAL RECONCILIATION HYPOTHESIS Canonical Statutory Formula

theory.canonical_statement: [ID 1130] BIOLOGICAL RECONCILIATION HYPOTHESIS Canonical Statutory Formula: $153,600 \equiv \text{Genome} {org} / \text{Unit} {func}$ Formal Technical Dissertation: The fundamental reconciliation axiom. It states that the specific number 153,600 is not a derived constant of vacuum physics, but an emergent property of human genomic organization. The system architecture is thus "tuned" specifically to the human operator's biological frequency rather than universal constants. Source: [8]
theory.technical_interpretation: BIOLOGICAL RECONCILIATION HYPOTHESIS Canonical Statutory Formula is a symbolic expression, written 153,600 ≡ Genome org / Unit func. It introduces a symbol or relation used elsewhere in the framework. It is built from o, r, g, f, u, n. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
